# SatsAPI

> Bitcoin market intelligence API. Pay per call with Lightning Network using L402. No API keys, no subscriptions, no registration.

SatsAPI is a Bitcoin data API that uses the L402 protocol (HTTP 402 + Lightning Network) for pay-per-call authentication. Instead of API keys or subscriptions, callers pay a tiny Lightning invoice per request — between 2 and 200 satoshis (~$0.001 to ~$0.12).

The API is designed for both human developers and autonomous AI agents. Every response includes structured JSON optimized for programmatic consumption, and the /v1/summary endpoint returns a flat `bot_ready` object with only primitive values — no parsing required.

## Base URL

https://satsapi.dev

## Endpoints

- GET /v1/price — Real-time BTC price with RSI (1D/4H/1H), MACD bias, 50/200-day moving averages, Bollinger Bands and trend direction. Cost: 3 sats.
- GET /v1/mempool — Mempool status with optimal fees for 10min, 30min and 1h confirmation windows. Last block data and congestion level. Cost: 2 sats.
- GET /v1/tx/:txid — Transaction lookup by TXID. Returns confirmation status, block position, fee details and transferred value. Cost: 2 sats.
- GET /v1/onchain — Fear & Greed index, BTC dominance, circulating supply, hashrate trend and market phase. Cost: 15 sats.
- GET /v1/derivatives — Funding rates, open interest, long/short ratio and leverage risk assessment. Cost: 15 sats.
- GET /v1/news — AI-powered daily Bitcoin news summary with sentiment analysis (BULLISH/NEUTRAL/BEARISH). Cost: 50 sats.
- GET /v1/signal — 9-factor BUY/SELL/HOLD signal with confluence score, confidence, risk level, AI reasoning, historical context and ATR-based trade setup. Factors: RSI multi-timeframe, trend, Pi Cycle Top, Fear & Greed, news sentiment, derivatives, MACD, Bollinger Bands, timeframe alignment. Cost: 150 sats.
- GET /v1/summary — Full market intelligence report aggregating all endpoints. Includes executive summary, bot_ready object, risk matrix, key levels and all factor data. Cost: 200 sats.

## Authentication — L402 Protocol

1. Make a GET request to any endpoint
2. Server returns HTTP 402 with: `{ invoice, payment_hash, amount_sats }`
3. Pay the Lightning invoice with any Lightning wallet
4. Retry the request with `?payment_hash=<hash>`
5. Server returns 200 with data

No registration required. No API key. The payment proves access.

## bot_ready Object

The /v1/summary endpoint returns a flat `bot_ready` object for AI agents:

```json
{
  "signal": "HOLD",
  "confluence": 45,
  "market_score": 61,
  "market_score_label": "BULLISH",
  "price_usd": 68093.89,
  "rsi_1d": 56.7,
  "fear_greed": 8,
  "fear_greed_label": "Extreme Fear",
  "leverage_risk": "LOW",
  "funding_bias": "NEUTRAL",
  "news_sentiment": "BULLISH",
  "btc_dominance": "56.6%",
  "support": 60941.17,
  "resistance": 73640.74,
  "highest_risk": "OPPORTUNITY"
}
```

Agent decision logic example:
```python
if data['signal'] == 'BUY' and data['confluence'] > 65 and data['leverage_risk'] != 'EXTREME':
    execute_buy()
```

## Rate Limits

- Standard endpoints (/v1/price, /v1/mempool, /v1/tx, /v1/onchain, /v1/derivatives): 60 req/min
- AI endpoints (/v1/news, /v1/signal): 10 req/min
- Summary endpoint (/v1/summary): 5 req/min

## Public Endpoints (no payment required)

- GET / — API index with endpoint list and costs
- GET /health — Live node status (phoenixd state, balance, block height)
- GET /docs — Full documentation

## Links

- Documentation: https://satsapi.dev/docs
- Health status: https://satsapi.dev/health
- GitHub: https://github.com/Aperezvigoa/satsapi
